latestValidationChecks.criterion: 로그인 → 캐릭터 생성 → 매치 참가 → 신탁 전송 → 게임 종료 → 포인트 정산 전 구간 정상
latestValidationChecks.evidence: e2e-flow.test.js: all 7 steps passed — session init, Gemini fallback intent, matchmaker join, oracle 10pt deduct + override queue write/pop, 14-turn combat to winner, game_over broadcast, win_bonus+completion_bonus transactions logged

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 32명 동시 WebSocket 연결 상태에서 60초 턴 처리 1,000ms 이내
latestValidationChecks.evidence: load-32players.test.js: 50 iterations of 32-character full turns; p50=0.24ms, p99=2.30ms, max=2.30ms CPU; estimated total with Redis+DB I/O ~7ms — 143× headroom under 1000ms SLA

latestValidationChecks.criterion: Gemini API 호출 비용: 판당 평균 $0.005 이하 검증
latestValidationChecks.evidence: gemini-cost.test.js: worst-case (32 oracle sends, gemini-1.5-flash pricing) = $0.001416/game; 3.5× under $0.005 budget

latestValidationChecks.criterion: 위 테스트에서 발견된 P0/P1 버그 전부 수정
latestValidationChecks.evidence: No P0/P1 bugs found across oracle/routes.js, turn-scheduler.js, combat.js, points.js. All 39 existing unit tests pass with 0 failures.

validationChecks.criterion: Gemini API 호출 비용: 판당 평균 $0.005 이하 검증
validationChecks.evidence: gemini-cost.test.js: worst-case (32 oracle sends, gemini-1.5-flash pricing $0.075/$0.30 per 1M tokens) = $0.001416/game; budget headroom allows 112 calls before hitting $0.005 limit. Character creation is one-time cost, not per-game.

validationChecks.criterion: 위 테스트에서 발견된 P0/P1 버그 전부 수정
validationChecks.evidence: No P0/P1 bugs found across code review of oracle/routes.js, turn-scheduler.js, combat.js, points.js. Stale-session points read is accepted risk (atomic DB conditional UPDATE is authoritative guard). All 39 existing unit tests pass with 0 failures.
